greengrassv2.deployment.iotjobrateincrea: Contains information about criteria to meet before a job increases its rollout rate. Specify either `numberOfNotifiedThings` or `numberOfSucceededThings`.

greengrassv2.deployment.iotjobrateincrea.Description: The number of devices to receive the job notification before the rollout rate increases.
The number of devices to successfully run the configuration job before the rollout rate increases.
